hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const o=JSON.parse(d);const f=o.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(jsx?|mjs)$/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(f)}else{process.exit(0)}})" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
